subcodes.first_line: O servant who turneth toward God and who is accepted at His Most Great Threshold! That which thou didst write and that which lay concealed within thy heart is evident [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مقبل الی الله و مقبول درگاه کبریا آنچه نگاشتی و مضمر ضمیر داشتی مشهود
subcodes.subjects: @attaining the life of the spirit, @praise and encouragement
